Course outcome

You’ll leave with a professional portfolio, a personal brand and the confidence to speak about your work.

Most importantly, you’ll leave ready to land a job, freelance, or launch your own thing.

82%
of our graduates are working in design, the arts or creative industries within a year of finishing the course.*

11k+
Shillington graduates worldwide. Tap into a network that helps you find work, grow confidence and keep levelling up.

29
years of empowering people to take that leap of faith into a creative career.

Design your future as a

Graphic Designer

Graduate with a standout portfolio.

In your final module, you’ll refine your top projects, develop your personal brand and create a portfolio and website that reflect your voice, vision and strengths.

Immersive studio experience

Real skills for the real world.

This isn’t just about learning software. You’ll be part of a collaborative studio experience that mirrors the design industry. Live feedback, real briefs and constant support from industry pros.

Live classes and flexible learning
Join live sessions online where you’ll learn directly from working designers through lectures, demos and creative briefs. You’ll also get access to guided resources to help you stay on track between classes.

Feedback from real designers
Get honest, helpful feedback from people who’ve done the job. Through personal critiques and group reviews, you’ll grow your skills, strengthen your ideas and build confidence in your work.

Projects that reflect the real industry
Work on briefs across branding, UI, packaging, editorial and more. You’ll solve real problems, meet real deadlines and get a true taste of life as a designer.

Master the tools you’ll actually use
Learn the software that powers the industry: Adobe InDesign, Illustrator and Figma. You’ll also use tools like Slack, Notion and Loom so you’re ready to hit the ground running in your next role.

Graduate with a portfolio that opens doors
You’ll leave with a case-study portfolio website and a sleek interactive folio built for interviews. Every project you include will show your process, ideas and ability to think like a designer.

Your course journey

Course Modules

We refresh our course every 3 months, so you’re learning the latest design trends, tools and best practices.

Built with industry partners
Curriculum co‑developed with leading agencies, design studios and our network of 11,000+ graduates.

Career‑focused learning
3 months full‑time or 9 months part‑time, packed with studio‑style briefs that replicate real client work.

Employer‑driven updates
The course is continually refined based on feedback from hiring managers, our teachers and graduate outcomes.

Learn to think and work like a designer.

You’ll build creative confidence and develop the design thinking that helps you solve real-world problems and create bold, original work.

Your teachers are working professionals. Creative directors, brand specialists, UX designers and more. They’ve been where you want to go, and they’ll help you get there with support, critique and real insight.

Choose your pace

There are two ways to study at Shillington. Both options ensure accountability and live learning whilst providing the flexibility you might need.

It's the same course, just two ways.

Full-time

3 month course. Learn like you're working in a real design studio, five days a week, immersing yourself fully in graphic design.

Commit yourself 100% to learning Monday-Friday and start your creative career as quickly as possible.

🔴 4 hours live teaching per day
Join Zoom for lectures, critiques and demos to stay on track and have accountability.

🕒 3.5 hours of independent learning per day
Designed to suit your schedule, you'll have tasks to complete for the following day.

💬 community support via Slack
Because good things won't happen in isolation, you'll be connected with your classmates and other classes as well as your teachers to share questions, tech help and inspiration outside of live class time.

Part-time

9 month course. The same studio-style learning spread over two nights per week.

No need to quit your job. Built for busy people who still want accountability when they learn. A faster, smarter alternative to university that gets you industry-ready on your terms.

🔴 6 hours live teaching per week
Join Zoom for lectures, critiques and demos to stay on track and have accountability.

🕒 4 hours of independent learning per week.
Designed to suit your schedule, you'll have tasks to complete for the following week.

💬 community support via Slack
Because good things won't happen in isolation, you'll be connected with your classmates and other classes as well as your teachers to share questions, tech help and inspiration outside of live class time.

Choose a schedule that works for your life.

FAQs

Read More FAQs

Got questions? Let’s clear them up.

Do I need to be good at drawing?
Nope. It’s about ideas, not illustration.

Will I learn AI tools?
Yes. You’ll learn how to use AI as a creative tool, not a shortcut.

Will I get a qualification?
You’ll get a certificate but most importantly, you’ll graduate with a portfolio that shows what you can do.

What if I miss a live class?
We don’t record live classes (apart from teacher training or marketing purposes) as they’re highly interactive and collaborative. However, we provide detailed resources, step-by-step guides, and example projects to help you catch up on missed content. Our teachers are also available during set times to offer support and answer any questions. You can learn more about our attendance and learning process here.

Find out if Shillington is right for you.
